rows.criterion: JSON ticket record fields extracted correctly
CSV ticket row fields extracted correctly
Labeled blob contains one labeled section per scalar field
Nested/list comments field rendered as marker-delimited blocks, order preserved
COMMENTS: 0 header present when no comments (no silent omission)
Missing optional fields (assignee, comments) do not raise, render as empty sections
JSON and CSV input for the same logical record produce identical blob output (format parity across both input forms)
All structured input fields are present somewhere in the output blob (nothing silently dropped)
normalize_ticket_json_str convenience wrapper parses raw JSON text fixture correctly
